structured_payload_candidate.title: Parallel Fan-Powered Terminal Unit Control Logic
structured_payload_candidate.section_title: Control Logic for Variable-Volume Parallel Fan-Powered VAV Zone
structured_payload_candidate.equipment_scope: Parallel fan-powered VAV terminal unit with variable-volume fan
structured_payload_candidate.summary: In cooling mode, cooling loop output maps to active airflow setpoint from minimum to cooling maximum; if AHU SAT > room temp, setpoint ≤ minimum. Heating coil off. Parallel fan starts when primary airflow drops below Voz minus half Pfan-z (ASHRAE 62.1) or Zone-Abs-OA-min minus half Pfan-z (Title 24), shuts off when above Voz or Zone-Abs-OA-min. Fan airflow setpoint equals Voz or Zone-Abs-OA-min minus current primary airflow setpoint. In deadband, active primary airflow setpoint = minimum endpoint; heating coil off; fan runs if setpoint below Voz or Zone-Abs-OA-min. In heating, active primary airflow setpoint = minimum; fan runs; heating loop 0-50% resets discharge temp from AHU SAT to MaxΔT above space temp; 50-100% resets fan airflow from deadband value to Pfan-htgmax.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: Zone state changes (cooling, deadband, heating) based on temperature control loop.
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Follow the sequence for each zone state as described.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: 5.8.5. Control logic is depicted schematically in Figure 5.8.5 and described in the following subsections.

evidence_quote: 5.8.5. Control logic is depicted schematically in Figure 5.8.5 and described in the following subsections.
evidence_text: 5.8.5. Control logic is depicted schematically in Figure 5.8.5 and described in the following subsections.
judge_reason: Evidence is only a section heading overview, not the actual control sequence details; unsupported.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Snap-Acting Dual-Duct VAV Terminal Unit Control Logic (Single Discharge Sensor)
structured_payload_candidate.section_title: Temperature and Damper Control with a Single Discharge Airflow Sensor
structured_payload_candidate.equipment_scope: Dual-duct VAV terminal unit with single discharge airflow sensor
structured_payload_candidate.summary: When cooling, cooling-loop output resets active discharge airflow setpoint from min to cooling max; cold damper modulates; hot damper closed. When deadband, active discharge setpoint = min, maintained by damper from previous mode (snap-action). When heating, heating-loop output resets active discharge setpoint from min to heating max; hot damper modulates; cold damper closed.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: Zone State changes between cooling, deadband, and heating
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Cooling: discharge setpoint = min to Vcool-max, cold damper modulates, hot damper closed. Deadband: discharge setpoint = min, maintained by damper from previous mode (snap-action). Heating: discharge setpoint = min to Vheat-max, hot damper modulates, cold damper closed.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: When the Zone State is cooling, the cooling-loop output shall reset the active discharge airflow setpoint from the minimum endpoint to cooling maximum endpoint.

evidence_quote: 5.1.15.2.  Two runtime points shall be defined for each equipment:
anchor_repair_reason: evidence_quote replaced with verbatim section heading line
evidence_text: 5.1.15.2.  Two runtime points shall be defined for each equipment:
judge_reason: Evidence does not support the summary; the provided snippet mentions runtime points unrelated to dual-duct control logic.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Overriding Logic to Avoid Backflow
structured_payload_candidate.section_title: Overriding Sections 5.11.5.1 and 5.11.5.2 Logic (to Avoid Backflow from One Duct to the Other)
structured_payload_candidate.summary: If heating air handler is not proven ON, heating damper shall be closed. If cooling air handler is not proven ON, cooling damper shall be closed.
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Close respective damper when air handler is off.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: If heating air handler is not proven ON, the heating damper shall be closed.

evidence_quote: If heating air handler is not proven ON, the heating damper shall be closed.
evidence_text: If heating air handler is not proven ON, the heating damper shall be closed.
judge_reason: Evidence only supports heating damper interlock, not cooling damper interlock as stated in summary.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Testing/Commissioning Overrides
structured_payload_candidate.summary: Provide software switches to force zone airflow setpoint to zero, Vcool-max, Vmin, Vheat-max; force cooling/heating damper full closed/open; reset request-hours accumulator. All hardware points can be overridden through BAS. Overrides can be applied at Zone Group level.
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Provide software switches for forced setpoints and damper positions. Allow group-level override.
structured_payload_candidate.commissioning_check: CxA can check for leaking dampers by forcing all VAV boxes closed and recording AHU airflow.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: Provide software switches that interlock to a system level point to force zone airflow setpoint to zero, force zone airflow setpoint to Vcool-max, force zone airflow setpoint to Vmin, force zone airflow setpoint to Vheat-max, force cooling damper full closed/open, force heating damper full closed/open, and reset request-hours accumulator point to zero.

anchor_repair_reason: evidence_quote replaced with verbatim section heading line
judge_reason: Evidence does not support the summary; evidence references section 5.1.17 Air Economizer High Limits, not Testing/Commissioning Overrides.
